steps.title: Find the slope from the two points
Evaluate each answer choice
steps.content:
• A. $h(x) = \frac{1}{2}x - \frac{7}{2}$: slope is $\tfrac{1}{2}$, not 2; eliminated.
  • B. $h(x) = 2x + 7$: slope 2 and $h(7) = 21$, $h(9) = 25$; matches.
  • C. $h(x) = 7x + 21$: $h(7) = 70$, not 21; eliminated.
  • D. $h(x) = 9x + 25$: $h(7) = 88$, not 21; eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
